prompt: Create a realistic full-body vertical street-fashion photo of a cheerful young adult woman posing on a city rooftop in daylight, centered and facing the camera with a relaxed stance and soft smile. She has light brown wavy shoulder-length hair with straight bangs, pink translucent glasses, natural cute makeup, and a curvy kawaii-gal silhouette. Dress her in pink-and-white cute gyaru fashion: a white sleeveless tank top with a low scoop neckline and a large pastel anime-style graphic reading “MALLYAN” across the chest, a pink plaid pleated micro skirt, white crew socks, and chunky white platform sneakers with small pink accents. Include exactly 7 visible accessories: 1 pair of pink glasses, 2 heart-shaped dangling earrings, 2 delicate necklaces, 1 small pink bow pinned near the tank strap, and 1 silver charm chain belt with heart charms and a tiny plush bunny charm hanging from the skirt. Set the scene on a concrete rooftop terrace with a white metal safety railing behind her, gray rooftop blocks and weathered concrete underfoot, and tall modern office buildings and skyscrapers in the background. Use natural midday sunlight, crisp shadows, realistic skin texture, smartphone-photo realism, slightly wide-angle full-body framing from head to shoes, high detail, bright airy colors, and an urban Tokyo-like atmosphere. Avoid extra people, avoid text other than the shirt graphic, and keep the outfit cute and fashionable rather than explicit.
promptEn: Create a realistic full-body vertical street-fashion photo of a cheerful young adult woman posing on a city rooftop in daylight, centered and facing the camera with a relaxed stance and soft smile. She has light brown wavy shoulder-length hair with straight bangs, pink translucent glasses, natural cute makeup, and a curvy kawaii-gal silhouette. promptZh: 创作一张写实的全景竖版街头时尚照片，拍摄一位在日光下站在城市天台摆姿势的开朗年轻女性，人物居中，面向镜头，姿态放松，面带柔和微笑。她拥有 浅棕色波浪肩长发，配有直刘海，佩戴粉色透明眼镜，妆容自然可爱，身材曲线符合可爱辣妹（kawaii-gal）风格。为她搭配 粉白系可爱辣妹时尚：一件白色无袖背心，低圆领设计，胸前印有巨大的粉彩色动漫风格“MALLYAN”字样，搭配粉色格纹百褶超短裙、白色中筒袜，以及带有粉色小装饰的厚底白色运动鞋。包含 7 个清晰可见的配饰：1 副粉色眼镜、2 只心形吊坠耳环、2 条精致项链、1 个别在背心肩带附近的粉色小蝴蝶结，以及 1 条银色挂饰链条腰带，腰带上挂有心形挂件和一个悬挂在裙子上的微型毛绒兔挂件。场景设定在混凝土天台露台，身后是白色金属安全护栏，脚下是灰色天台砖和风化的混凝土，背景是高耸的现代办公楼和摩天大楼。使用自然的正午阳光，阴影清晰，皮肤纹理写实，呈现智能手机拍摄的真实感，采用从头到脚的微广角全身构图，细节丰富，色彩明亮通透，营造出类似东京的城市氛围。避免出现其他人物，除背心上的图案外不要出现任何文字，保持服装可爱时尚，避免过于暴露。
